subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen beareth witness that thou hast turned unto the Kingdom and hearkened unto the call of God, the Lord of the worlds, and hast drunk [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم الاعلی بانک توجهت الی الملکوت و سمعت ندآء الله رب العالمین و شربت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
